items.name: Metformin
items.description: Oral diabetes medicine that helps control blood sugar levels.
items.dosage_info: Usually 500mg or 850mg once or twice daily with meals.

items.name: Lisinopril
items.description: ACE inhibitor used to treat high blood pressure and heart failure.

items.name: Atorvastatin
items.description: Statin medication used to prevent cardiovascular disease and treat abnormal lipid levels.

items.name: Aspirin
items.description: Nonsteroidal anti-inflammatory drug (NSAID) used to reduce pain, fever, or inflammation.
items.indications: Pain, Fever, Inflammation, Prevention of heart attack/stroke

items.name: Amoxicillin
items.indications: Bacterial infections (ear, nose, throat, skin, urinary tract)
items.dosage_info: Usually 250mg to 500mg every 8 hours or 500mg to 875mg every 12 hours.

items.name: Levothyroxine
items.description: Thyroid medicine that replaces a hormone normally produced by your thyroid gland.
items.dosage_info: Varies widely based on weight and age, taken on an empty stomach.

items.name: Amlodipine
items.description: Calcium channel blocker that dilates blood vessels and improves blood flow.
